# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

```
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
  - name: grpc
    port: 90
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
  - name: grpc
    port: 90
---

kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
  - name: grpc
    port: 90

metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
  - name: grpc
    port: 90
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
  - name: grpc
    port: 90
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
  - name: grpc
    port: 90
---

kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 8
